description: Built-in data-driven templates for BMS AUTOSAR code generation in Cline.

swc.arxml_template:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<AUTOSAR xmlns="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0 AUTOSAR_00049.xsd">
  <ADMIN-DATA/>
  <AR-PACKAGES>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_Types</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>uint8</SHORT-NAME>
          <CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY>
          <SW-DATA-DEF-PROPS>
            <COMPU-METHODS>
              <COMPU-METHOD>
                <SHORT-NAME>uint8_CompuMethod</SHORT-NAME>
                <CATEGORY>IDENTICAL</CATEGORY>
              </COMPU-METHOD>
            </COMPU-METHODS>
          </SW-DATA-DEF-PROPS>
        </IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>uint16</SHORT-NAME>
          <CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY>
        </IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>sint16</SHORT-NAME>
          <CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY>
        </IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>float32</SHORT-NAME>
          <CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY>
        </IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>boolean</SHORT-NAME>
          <CATEGORY>BOOLEAN</CATEGORY>
        </IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>Percent_Type</SHORT-NAME>
          <CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY>
        </IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>Adc_VoltageType</SHORT-NAME>
          <CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY>
        </IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>Temperature_DegCType</SHORT-NAME>
          <CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY>
        </IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>Diag_RequestType</SHORT-NAME>
          <CATEGORY>STRUCTURE</CATEGORY>
        </IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_Interfaces</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
{{#each ports}}{{#if interface_sr}}        <SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
          <DATA-ELEMENTS>
            <VARIABLE-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>Value</SHORT-NAME>
              <TYPE-TREF DEST="IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE">/${ComponentName}_Types/${data_type}</TYPE-TREF>
            </VARIABLE-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
          </DATA-ELEMENTS>
        </SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE>
{{else}}        <CLIENT-SERVER-INTERFACE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
          <OPERATIONS>
            <CLIENT-SERVER-OPERATION>
              <SHORT-NAME>Request</SHORT-NAME>
              <ARGUMENTS>
                <ARGUMENT-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
                  <SHORT-NAME>request</SHORT-NAME>
                  <TYPE-TREF DEST="IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE">/${ComponentName}_Types/${data_type}</TYPE-TREF>
                  <DIRECTION>IN</DIRECTION>
                </ARGUMENT-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
              </ARGUMENTS>
            </CLIENT-SERVER-OPERATION>
          </OPERATIONS>
        </CLIENT-SERVER-INTERFACE>
{{/if}}{{/each}}      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
        <APPLICATION-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}</SHORT-NAME>
          <PORTS>
{{#each ports}}{{#if direction_required}}            <R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
              <REQUIRED-INTERFACE-TREF DEST="{{#if interface_sr}}SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE{{/if}}{{#if interface_cs}}CLIENT-SERVER-INTERFACE{{/if}}">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}</REQUIRED-INTERFACE-TREF>
            </R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{else}}            <P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
              <PROVIDED-INTERFACE-TREF DEST="{{#if interface_sr}}SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE{{/if}}{{#if interface_cs}}CLIENT-SERVER-INTERFACE{{/if}}">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}</PROVIDED-INTERFACE-TREF>
            </P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{/if}}{{/each}}          </PORTS>
          <INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS>
            <SWC-INTERNAL-BEHAVIOR>
              <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}Behavior</SHORT-NAME>
              <RUNNABLES>
{{#each runnables}}                <RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
                  <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
                  <CAN-BE-INVOKED-CONCURRENTLY>false</CAN-BE-INVOKED-CONCURRENTLY>
                  <MINIMUM-START-INTERVAL>0</MINIMUM-START-INTERVAL>
                </RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
{{/each}}              </RUNNABLES>
              <EVENTS>
{{#each runnables}}{{#if event_TimingEvent}}                <TIMING-EVENT>
                  <SHORT-NAME>${name}_TimingEvent</SHORT-NAME>
                  <START-ON-EVENT-REF DEST="RUNNABLE-ENTITY">/${ComponentName}/${ComponentName}Behavior/${name}</START-ON-EVENT-REF>
                  <PERIOD>${period_s}</PERIOD>
                </TIMING-EVENT>
{{/if}}{{#if event_DataReceivedEvent}}                <DATA-RECEIVED-EVENT>
                  <SHORT-NAME>${name}_DataReceivedEvent</SHORT-NAME>
                  <START-ON-EVENT-REF DEST="RUNNABLE-ENTITY">/${ComponentName}/${ComponentName}Behavior/${name}</START-ON-EVENT-REF>
                  <DATA-RECEIVED-EVENT-REF DEST="VARIABLE-DATA-PROTOTYPE">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}/Value</DATA-RECEIVED-EVENT-REF>
                </DATA-RECEIVED-EVENT>
{{/if}}{{#if event_OperationInvokedEvent}}                <OPERATION-INVOKED-EVENT>
                  <SHORT-NAME>${name}_OperationInvokedEvent</SHORT-NAME>
                  <START-ON-EVENT-REF DEST="RUNNABLE-ENTITY">/${ComponentName}/${ComponentName}Behavior/${name}</START-ON-EVENT-REF>
                  <OPERATION-IREF>
                    <CONTEXT-P-PORT-REF DEST="P-PORT-PROTOTYPE">/${ComponentName}/${name}</CONTEXT-P-PORT-REF>
                    <TARGET-PROVIDED-OPERATION-REF DEST="CLIENT-SERVER-OPERATION">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}/Request</TARGET-PROVIDED-OPERATION-REF>
                  </OPERATION-IREF>
                </OPERATION-INVOKED-EVENT>
{{/if}}{{/each}}              </EVENTS>
            </SWC-INTERNAL-BEHAVIOR>
          </INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS>
        </APPLICATION-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
  </AR-PACKAGES>
</AUTOSAR>

rte_interface.arxml_template:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<AUTOSAR xmlns="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0 AUTOSAR_00049.xsd">
  <AR-PACKAGES>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>Interfaces</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
{{#each ports}}{{#if interface_sr}}        <SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
          <DATA-ELEMENTS>
            <VARIABLE-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>Value</SHORT-NAME>
            </VARIABLE-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
          </DATA-ELEMENTS>
        </SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE>
{{else}}        <CLIENT-SERVER-INTERFACE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
          <OPERATIONS>
            <CLIENT-SERVER-OPERATION>
              <SHORT-NAME>Operation</SHORT-NAME>
            </CLIENT-SERVER-OPERATION>
          </OPERATIONS>
        </CLIENT-SERVER-INTERFACE>
{{/if}}{{/each}}      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
  </AR-PACKAGES>
</AUTOSAR>

arxml_descriptor.arxml_template:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<AUTOSAR xmlns="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0 AUTOSAR_00049.xsd">
  <AR-PACKAGES>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
{{#if ports}}        <!-- Ports populated from request -->
{{#each ports}}{{#if direction_required}}        <R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
        </R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{else}}        <P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
        </P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{/if}}{{/each}}{{/if}}{{#if runnables}}        <!-- Runnables populated from request -->
{{#each runnables}}        <RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
          <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
        </RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
{{/each}}{{/if}}{{#unless ports}}{{#unless runnables}}        <!-- Add AUTOSAR elements here -->
{{/unless}}{{/unless}}      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
  </AR-PACKAGES>
</AUTOSAR>

service.arxml_template:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<AUTOSAR xmlns="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0 AUTOSAR_00049.xsd">
  <ADMIN-DATA/>
  <AR-PACKAGES>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_Types</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>uint8</SHORT-NAME>
          <CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY>
        </IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>uint16</SHORT-NAME>
          <CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY>
        </IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>uint32</SHORT-NAME>
          <CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY>
        </IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>Diag_RequestType</SHORT-NAME>
          <CATEGORY>STRUCTURE</CATEGORY>
        </IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_Interfaces</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
{{#each ports}}{{#if interface_sr}}        <SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
          <DATA-ELEMENTS>
            <VARIABLE-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>Value</SHORT-NAME>
              <TYPE-TREF DEST="IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE">/${ComponentName}_Types/${data_type}</TYPE-TREF>
            </VARIABLE-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
          </DATA-ELEMENTS>
        </SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE>
{{else}}        <CLIENT-SERVER-INTERFACE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
          <OPERATIONS>
            <CLIENT-SERVER-OPERATION>
              <SHORT-NAME>Request</SHORT-NAME>
              <ARGUMENTS>
                <ARGUMENT-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
                  <SHORT-NAME>request</SHORT-NAME>
                  <TYPE-TREF DEST="IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE">/${ComponentName}_Types/${data_type}</TYPE-TREF>
                  <DIRECTION>IN</DIRECTION>
                </ARGUMENT-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
              </ARGUMENTS>
            </CLIENT-SERVER-OPERATION>
          </OPERATIONS>
        </CLIENT-SERVER-INTERFACE>
{{/if}}{{/each}}      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
        <SERVICE-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}</SHORT-NAME>
          <PORTS>
{{#each ports}}{{#if direction_required}}            <R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
              <REQUIRED-INTERFACE-TREF DEST="{{#if interface_sr}}SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE{{/if}}{{#if interface_cs}}CLIENT-SERVER-INTERFACE{{/if}}">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}</REQUIRED-INTERFACE-TREF>
            </R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{else}}            <P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
              <PROVIDED-INTERFACE-TREF DEST="{{#if interface_sr}}SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE{{/if}}{{#if interface_cs}}CLIENT-SERVER-INTERFACE{{/if}}">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}</PROVIDED-INTERFACE-TREF>
            </P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{/if}}{{/each}}          </PORTS>
          <INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS>
            <SWC-INTERNAL-BEHAVIOR>
              <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}Behavior</SHORT-NAME>
              <RUNNABLES>
{{#each runnables}}                <RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
                  <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
                  <CAN-BE-INVOKED-CONCURRENTLY>false</CAN-BE-INVOKED-CONCURRENTLY>
                  <MINIMUM-START-INTERVAL>0</MINIMUM-START-INTERVAL>
                </RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
{{/each}}              </RUNNABLES>
              <EVENTS>
{{#each runnables}}{{#if event_TimingEvent}}                <TIMING-EVENT>
                  <SHORT-NAME>${name}_TimingEvent</SHORT-NAME>
                  <START-ON-EVENT-REF DEST="RUNNABLE-ENTITY">/${ComponentName}/${ComponentName}Behavior/${name}</START-ON-EVENT-REF>
                  <PERIOD>${period_s}</PERIOD>
                </TIMING-EVENT>
{{/if}}{{#if event_DataReceivedEvent}}                <DATA-RECEIVED-EVENT>
                  <SHORT-NAME>${name}_DataReceivedEvent</SHORT-NAME>
                  <START-ON-EVENT-REF DEST="RUNNABLE-ENTITY">/${ComponentName}/${ComponentName}Behavior/${name}</START-ON-EVENT-REF>
                  <DATA-RECEIVED-EVENT-REF DEST="VARIABLE-DATA-PROTOTYPE">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}/Value</DATA-RECEIVED-EVENT-REF>
                </DATA-RECEIVED-EVENT>
{{/if}}{{#if event_OperationInvokedEvent}}                <OPERATION-INVOKED-EVENT>
                  <SHORT-NAME>${name}_OperationInvokedEvent</SHORT-NAME>
                  <START-ON-EVENT-REF DEST="RUNNABLE-ENTITY">/${ComponentName}/${ComponentName}Behavior/${name}</START-ON-EVENT-REF>
                  <OPERATION-IREF>
                    <CONTEXT-P-PORT-REF DEST="P-PORT-PROTOTYPE">/${ComponentName}/${name}</CONTEXT-P-PORT-REF>
                    <TARGET-PROVIDED-OPERATION-REF DEST="CLIENT-SERVER-OPERATION">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}/Request</TARGET-PROVIDED-OPERATION-REF>
                  </OPERATION-IREF>
                </OPERATION-INVOKED-EVENT>
{{/if}}{{/each}}              </EVENTS>
            </SWC-INTERNAL-BEHAVIOR>
          </INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS>
        </SERVICE-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
  </AR-PACKAGES>
</AUTOSAR>

ecu_extract.arxml_template:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<AUTOSAR xmlns="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0 AUTOSAR_00049.xsd">
  <ADMIN-DATA/>
  <AR-PACKAGES>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${CompositionName}</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
        <COMPOSITION-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${CompositionName}</SHORT-NAME>
          <COMPONENTS>
{{#each components}}            <SW-COMPONENT-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
              <TYPE-TREF DEST="{{type}}">${path}</TYPE-TREF>
            </SW-COMPONENT-PROTOTYPE>
{{/each}}          </COMPONENTS>
        </COMPOSITION-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
        <ROOT-SW-COMPOSITION-PROTOTYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${CompositionName}_Root</SHORT-NAME>
          <SOFTWARE-COMPOSITION-TREF DEST="COMPOSITION-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE">/${CompositionName}/${CompositionName}</SOFTWARE-COMPOSITION-TREF>
        </ROOT-SW-COMPOSITION-PROTOTYPE>
      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
  </AR-PACKAGES>
</AUTOSAR>

bms_csc.arxml_template:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<AUTOSAR xmlns="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0 AUTOSAR_00049.xsd">
  <ADMIN-DATA/>
  <AR-PACKAGES>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_Types</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE><SHORT-NAME>uint8</SHORT-NAME><CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY></IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE><SHORT-NAME>uint16</SHORT-NAME><CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY></IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE><SHORT-NAME>sint16</SHORT-NAME><CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY></IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE><SHORT-NAME>Adc_VoltageType</SHORT-NAME><CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY></IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE><SHORT-NAME>Temperature_DegCType</SHORT-NAME><CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY></IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_Interfaces</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
{{#each ports}}        <SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
          <DATA-ELEMENTS>
            <VARIABLE-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>Value</SHORT-NAME>
              <TYPE-TREF DEST="IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE">/${ComponentName}_Types/${data_type}</TYPE-TREF>
            </VARIABLE-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
          </DATA-ELEMENTS>
        </SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE>
{{/each}}      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
        <APPLICATION-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}</SHORT-NAME>
          <PORTS>
{{#each ports}}{{#if direction_required}}            <R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
              <REQUIRED-INTERFACE-TREF DEST="SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}</REQUIRED-INTERFACE-TREF>
            </R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{else}}            <P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
              <PROVIDED-INTERFACE-TREF DEST="SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}</PROVIDED-INTERFACE-TREF>
            </P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{/if}}{{/each}}          </PORTS>
          <INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS>
            <SWC-INTERNAL-BEHAVIOR>
              <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_InternalBehavior</SHORT-NAME>
              <RUNNABLES>
{{#each runnables}}                <RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
                  <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
                  <MINIMUM-START-INTERVAL>0</MINIMUM-START-INTERVAL>
                </RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
{{/each}}              </RUNNABLES>
              <EVENTS>
{{#each runnables}}{{#if event_TimingEvent}}                <TIMING-EVENT>
                  <SHORT-NAME>TiEv_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
                  <START-ON-EVENT-REF DEST="RUNNABLE-ENTITY">/${ComponentName}/${ComponentName}/INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS/${ComponentName}_InternalBehavior/RUNNABLES/${name}</START-ON-EVENT-REF>
                  <PERIOD>${period_s}</PERIOD>
                </TIMING-EVENT>
{{/if}}{{/each}}              </EVENTS>
            </SWC-INTERNAL-BEHAVIOR>
          </INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS>
        </APPLICATION-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
  </AR-PACKAGES>
</AUTOSAR>

bms_controller.arxml_template:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<AUTOSAR xmlns="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0 AUTOSAR_00049.xsd">

              <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>

            </P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{/if}}{{/each}}          </PORTS>
          <INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS>

                  <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
                  <MINIMUM-START-INTERVAL>0</MINIMUM-START-INTERVAL>
                </RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
{{/each}}              </RUNNABLES>
              <EVENTS>
{{#each runnables}}{{#if event_TimingEvent}}                <TIMING-EVENT>
                  <SHORT-NAME>TiEv_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
                  <START-ON-EVENT-REF DEST="RUNNABLE-ENTITY">/${ComponentName}/${ComponentName}/INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS/${ComponentName}_InternalBehavior/RUNNABLES/${name}</START-ON-EVENT-REF>
                  <PERIOD>${period_s}</PERIOD>
                </TIMING-EVENT>
{{/if}}{{/each}}              </EVENTS>
            </SWC-INTERNAL-BEHAVIOR>
          </INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS>
        </APPLICATION-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
  </AR-PACKAGES>
</AUTOSAR>

bms_balancer.arxml_template:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<AUTOSAR xmlns="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0 AUTOSAR_00049.xsd">
  <ADMIN-DATA/>
  <AR-PACKAGES>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_Types</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE><SHORT-NAME>uint8</SHORT-NAME><CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY></IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE><SHORT-NAME>uint16</SHORT-NAME><CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY></IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE><SHORT-NAME>Adc_VoltageType</SHORT-NAME><CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY></IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_Interfaces</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
{{#each ports}}        <SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
          <DATA-ELEMENTS>
            <VARIABLE-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>Value</SHORT-NAME>
              <TYPE-TREF DEST="IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE">/${ComponentName}_Types/${data_type}</TYPE-TREF>
            </VARIABLE-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
          </DATA-ELEMENTS>
        </SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE>
{{/each}}      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
        <APPLICATION-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}</SHORT-NAME>
          <PORTS>
{{#each ports}}{{#if direction_required}}            <R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
              <REQUIRED-INTERFACE-TREF DEST="SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}</REQUIRED-INTERFACE-TREF>
            </R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{else}}            <P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
              <PROVIDED-INTERFACE-TREF DEST="SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}</PROVIDED-INTERFACE-TREF>
            </P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{/if}}{{/each}}          </PORTS>
          <INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS>
            <SWC-INTERNAL-BEHAVIOR>
              <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_InternalBehavior</SHORT-NAME>
              <RUNNABLES>
{{#each runnables}}                <RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
                  <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
                  <MINIMUM-START-INTERVAL>0</MINIMUM-START-INTERVAL>
                </RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
{{/each}}              </RUNNABLES>
              <EVENTS>
{{#each runnables}}{{#if event_TimingEvent}}                <TIMING-EVENT>
                  <SHORT-NAME>TiEv_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
                  <START-ON-EVENT-REF DEST="RUNNABLE-ENTITY">/${ComponentName}/${ComponentName}/INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS/${ComponentName}_InternalBehavior/RUNNABLES/${name}</START-ON-EVENT-REF>
                  <PERIOD>${period_s}</PERIOD>
                </TIMING-EVENT>
{{/if}}{{/each}}              </EVENTS>
            </SWC-INTERNAL-BEHAVIOR>
          </INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS>
        </APPLICATION-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
  </AR-PACKAGES>
</AUTOSAR>

bms_diagnosis.arxml_template:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<AUTOSAR xmlns="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://autosar.org/schema/r4.0 AUTOSAR_00049.xsd">
  <ADMIN-DATA/>
  <AR-PACKAGES>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_Types</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE><SHORT-NAME>uint8</SHORT-NAME><CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY></IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE><SHORT-NAME>uint16</SHORT-NAME><CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY></IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE><SHORT-NAME>uint32</SHORT-NAME><CATEGORY>VALUE</CATEGORY></IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
        <IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE><SHORT-NAME>Diag_RequestType</SHORT-NAME><CATEGORY>STRUCTURE</CATEGORY></IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE>
      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_Interfaces</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
{{#each ports}}{{#if interface_sr}}        <SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
          <DATA-ELEMENTS>
            <VARIABLE-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>Value</SHORT-NAME>
              <TYPE-TREF DEST="IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE">/${ComponentName}_Types/${data_type}</TYPE-TREF>
            </VARIABLE-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
          </DATA-ELEMENTS>
        </SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE>
{{else}}        <CLIENT-SERVER-INTERFACE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
          <OPERATIONS>
            <CLIENT-SERVER-OPERATION>
              <SHORT-NAME>Request</SHORT-NAME>
              <ARGUMENTS>
                <ARGUMENT-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
                  <SHORT-NAME>request</SHORT-NAME>
                  <TYPE-TREF DEST="IMPLEMENTATION-DATA-TYPE">/${ComponentName}_Types/${data_type}</TYPE-TREF>
                </ARGUMENT-DATA-PROTOTYPE>
              </ARGUMENTS>
            </CLIENT-SERVER-OPERATION>
          </OPERATIONS>
        </CLIENT-SERVER-INTERFACE>
{{/if}}{{/each}}      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
    <AR-PACKAGE>
      <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}</SHORT-NAME>
      <ELEMENTS>
        <SERVICE-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
          <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}</SHORT-NAME>
          <PORTS>
{{#each ports}}{{#if direction_required}}{{#if interface_sr}}            <R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
              <REQUIRED-INTERFACE-TREF DEST="SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}</REQUIRED-INTERFACE-TREF>
            </R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{else}}            <R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
              <REQUIRED-INTERFACE-TREF DEST="CLIENT-SERVER-INTERFACE">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}</REQUIRED-INTERFACE-TREF>
            </R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{/if}}{{else}}{{#if interface_sr}}            <P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
              <PROVIDED-INTERFACE-TREF DEST="SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}</PROVIDED-INTERFACE-TREF>
            </P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{else}}            <P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
              <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
              <PROVIDED-INTERFACE-TREF DEST="CLIENT-SERVER-INTERFACE">/${ComponentName}_Interfaces/${ComponentName}_${name}</PROVIDED-INTERFACE-TREF>
            </P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
{{/if}}{{/if}}{{/each}}          </PORTS>
          <INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS>
            <SWC-INTERNAL-BEHAVIOR>
              <SHORT-NAME>${ComponentName}_InternalBehavior</SHORT-NAME>
              <RUNNABLES>
{{#each runnables}}                <RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
                  <SHORT-NAME>${name}</SHORT-NAME>
                  <MINIMUM-START-INTERVAL>0</MINIMUM-START-INTERVAL>
                </RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
{{/each}}              </RUNNABLES>
              <EVENTS>
{{#each runnables}}{{#if event_TimingEvent}}                <TIMING-EVENT>
                  <SHORT-NAME>TiEv_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
                  <START-ON-EVENT-REF DEST="RUNNABLE-ENTITY">/${ComponentName}/${ComponentName}/INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS/${ComponentName}_InternalBehavior/RUNNABLES/${name}</START-ON-EVENT-REF>
                  <PERIOD>${period_s}</PERIOD>
                </TIMING-EVENT>
{{/if}}{{#if event_DataReceivedEvent}}                <DATA-RECEIVED-EVENT>
                  <SHORT-NAME>DreEv_${name}</SHORT-NAME>
                  <START-ON-EVENT-REF DEST="RUNNABLE-ENTITY">/${ComponentName}/${ComponentName}/INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS/${ComponentName}_InternalBehavior/RUNNABLES/${name}</START-ON-EVENT-REF>
                </DATA-RECEIVED-EVENT>
{{/if}}{{/each}}              </EVENTS>
            </SWC-INTERNAL-BEHAVIOR>
          </INTERNAL-BEHAVIORS>
        </SERVICE-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
      </ELEMENTS>
    </AR-PACKAGE>
  </AR-PACKAGES>
</AUTOSAR>
